title: Support modules in generate blocks in vpi_iterate

features.name: labeled generate block with genvar for-loop
features.description: Code should include a generate block with a label that contains a genvar-based for-loop to create multiple instances

features.name: nested generate blocks with module instantiation
features.description: Code should include nested generate blocks where an inner generate block instantiates a module with generate-based parameter
features.snippet:
generate begin : outer
for (genvar i=0; i<3; i=i+1) begin : inner
module_name #(.PARAM(i)) inst();
end
end endgenerate
